The Aeron Chair by Herman Miller is a premium ergonomic office chair retailing at $1,495. It is currently in stock and listed under the Furniture category. Customers have rated it highly, with an average score of 4.7 out of 5 stars. The chair is available in sizes 28, 30, 32, and 34. It has been tagged as ergonomic, adjustable, and premium. Its dimensions are: width 68.5cm, depth 68.5cm, height 102cm.
